raw: {"perspective": "Legal Advisor", "findings": [{"severity": "WARN", "file_or_area": "GDPR Article 22", "issue": "Automated decision consent flow exists but may not be legally sufficient for all user cases", "recommended_fix": "Review and refine consent flow to ensure compliance with GDPR Article 22 for all automated decision-making processes"}, {"severity": "OK", "file_or_area": "AZ Personal Data Protection Act", "issue": "Compliant for Baku launch", "recommended_fix": "No action required at this time"}, {"severity": "BLOCK", "file_or_area": "Platform liability", "issue": "Using AURA score for hiring decisions may expose the platform to significant legal risk", "recommended_fix": "Re-evaluate the use of AURA scores in hiring decisions and consider alternative, legally compliant methods"}, {"severity": "WARN", "file_or_area": "Data processor agreements", "issue": "DPAs are in place for Supabase and Google Cloud but Railway's DPA status is unclear", "recommended_fix": "Verify and finalize DPA for Railway to ensure compliance"}, {"severity": "OK", "file_or_area": "Terms of Service", "issue": "Current ToS covers AI-generated assessments", "recommended_fix": "No action required at this time"}], "overall_verdict": "WARN", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Automated decision consent flow exists but may not be legally sufficient for all user cases
findings.recommended_fix: Review and refine consent flow to ensure compliance with GDPR Article 22 for all automated decision-making processes
No action required at this time

findings.issue: Using AURA score for hiring decisions may expose the platform to significant legal risk
findings.recommended_fix: Re-evaluate the use of AURA scores in hiring decisions and consider alternative, legally compliant methods

findings.issue: DPAs are in place for Supabase and Google Cloud but Railway's DPA status is unclear
findings.recommended_fix: Verify and finalize DPA for Railway to ensure compliance
No action required at this time
